# Welcome {.unnumbered}

This is the working manuscript of *The Automatic Business*.

Placeholder front matter. The real "Important: Read This First" and Preface
will be written here as we work through the front matter.

The chapter that follows is a pipeline-test conversion of the original
Chapter 1, used to prove the markdown to PDF and EPUB build. See
`reference/RESTRUCTURE_BLUEPRINT.md` for the full plan.
